assets.name: lecture_10_frame_01.png
assets.rationale: Best readable equal-point fermion anticommutator board state; it supports the exclusion-principle step without relying on a blurry reconstruction.

assets.name: lecture_10_frame_02.png
assets.rationale: Clearest usable review frame for the 1D Dirac setup, showing the right-moving equation and Hamiltonian form while the left-moving species is being added.

assets.name: lecture_10_frame_03.png
assets.rationale: Stable and legible Pauli-matrix identification frame; it cleanly anchors the move to the three-dimensional massless Dirac construction.
